name_cn:
Black Gold Buckle_24cm
#Monogram college#
A classic forever mail bag, the hot 24Cm model. A street style essential, a top choice for many Hollywood stars. Goes well with any outfit, looks casual and cool with casual wear, and elegant with formal wear. A bag for any occasion!! This year's it bag is definitely you!
Model: 392737
Size: 24x17x6cm
